name: Chocolate Rum Dums
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crushed wafer cookies, pecans, and sugar in a large bowl.
2. Add the light corn syrup and dark rum to the mixture. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Shape the mixture into round balls using teaspoons full of dough.
4. Let the shaped dums stand at room temperature for 10 minutes.
5. Roll each dum in additional Xx sugar before serving.
